artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2024-07-10
artifacts.excerpt: I'm starting to think that "psychics" were hypersensitive children with unpredictable parents who had to become Michelangelos of people pleasing, so now they have superhuman abilities to read and anticipate nonverbal cues. It's like a pre-scientific outsider cottage psychotherapy

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2023-05-29
artifacts.excerpt: I think women would like to compliment men more often, but given how few we already get, it's kind of like feeding a starving animal. There's a risk of getting mauled. https://t.co/3PWsSlKtSM
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: think, don, lot, really.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2022-11-27
artifacts.excerpt:
The real winning move is recognizing that if someone is repeating pre-chewed opinions, they're *anxious*. 

So you have an opportunity to be kind and change the subject to smth that's personally meaningful to them.

If you do that, they'll tell you everything they really think.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: think, don, lot, really.

planets.name: Don

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-11-29
artifacts.excerpt: The thing about Adderall and other stimulants is that they don't actually give you focus. What they do is chemically numb the separation you feel from your work, so it becomes bearable. They're an emotional analgesic - not artificial concentration, but a pharmaceutical merger of… https://t.co/S7HeUkJM0d
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, need.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-11-27
artifacts.excerpt:
Once again: There's no such thing as an NPC. Talk with any "normie" for 10m. They're perfectly capable of thinking for themselves. 

They just don't find independent thought as *meaningful* as well-worn discourse grooves, because social pressures are highly emotional for them.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, need.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-03-20
artifacts.excerpt: I don't know how anyone could look at the insane, tragic condition of contemporary sexual relations and conclude there's anything for men and women to do but try and forgive each other
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, need.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-01-28
artifacts.excerpt:
I don't know if there's a word for this, but one of the most manipulative and crazymaking things people do goes like this: 

1. They wrong you
2. You become justifiably angry
3. They act like your anger has victimized them
4. Now you're the bad guy
